title: Position Wanted
writer: Agenore Incrocci, Aldo De Benedetti, Federico Fellini
actors: Elsa Merlini, Gino Cervi, Giulietta Masina
plot: Housemaid Maria has been engaged to Berto for 15 years. Berto doesn't have a steady job so he's waiting for his Uncle Matteo's death, when he will come into an inheritance. In the meantime Maria goes on with her work, first in the...
